mapper.select: SELECT id, domain_id as domainId, entity_name as entityName, entity_id_name as entityIdName, description, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modifed as gmtModifed FROM domain_entity
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_entity (domain_id, entity_name, entity_id_name, description, gmt_create, gmt_modifed) VALUES (#{domainId}, #{entityName}, #{entityIdName}, #{description}, #{gmtCreate}, #{gmtModifed})
